1	# AI SDK - Black Forest Labs Provider
2	
3	The **[Black Forest Labs provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/black-forest-labs)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) adds image model support for the [Black Forest Labs API](https://docs.bfl.ai/).
4	
5	## Setup
6	
7	The Black Forest Labs provider is available in the `@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs` module. You can install it with
8	
9	```bash
10	pnpm add @ai-sdk/black-forest-labs
11	```
12	
13	## Skill for Coding Agents
14	
15	If you use coding agents such as Claude Code or Cursor, we highly recommend adding the AI SDK skill to your repository:
16	
17	```shell
18	npx skills add vercel/ai
19	```
20	
21	## Provider Instance
22	
23	You can import the default provider instance `blackForestLabs` from `@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs`:
24	
25	```ts
26	import { blackForestLabs } from '@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs';
27	```
28	
29	## Image Generation Example
30	
31	```ts
32	import fs from 'node:fs';
33	import { blackForestLabs } from '@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs';
34	import { generateImage } from 'ai';
35	
36	const { image } = await generateImage({
37	  model: blackForestLabs.image('flux-pro-1.1'),
38	  prompt: 'A cat wearing a intricate robe',
39	});
40	
41	const filename = `image-${Date.now()}.png`;
42	fs.writeFileSync(filename, image.uint8Array);
43	console.log(`Image saved to ${filename}`);
44	```
45	
46	## Additional Options
47	
48	If you want to pass additional inputs to the model besides the prompt, use the `providerOptions.blackForestLabs` property:
49	
50	```ts
51	import {
52	  blackForestLabs,
53	  type BlackForestLabsImageProviderOptions,
54	} from '@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs';
55	import { generateImage } from 'ai';
56	
57	const { image } = await generateImage({
58	  model: blackForestLabs.image('flux-pro-1.1'),
59	  prompt: 'A cat wearing an intricate robe',
60	  aspectRatio: '16:9',
61	  providerOptions: {
62	    blackForestLabs: {
63	      outputFormat: 'png',
64	    } satisfies BlackForestLabsImageProviderOptions,
65	  },
66	});
67	```
68	
69	## Configuring Base URL
70	
71	By default, the provider uses `https://api.bfl.ai/v1`. You can override this to use regional or legacy endpoints:
72	
73	```ts
74	import { createBlackForestLabs } from '@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs';
75	
76	const blackForestLabs = createBlackForestLabs({
77	  baseURL: 'https://api.eu.bfl.ai/v1',
78	  apiKey: process.env.BFL_API_KEY,
79	});
80	```
81	
82	## Configuring Polling
83	
84	You can customize how often the client polls for image completion and how long it waits before timing out:
85	
86	```ts
87	import { createBlackForestLabs } from '@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs';
88	
89	const blackForestLabs = createBlackForestLabs({
90	  apiKey: process.env.BFL_API_KEY,
91	  // Poll every 500ms, timeout after 5 minutes
92	  pollIntervalMillis: 500,
93	  pollTimeoutMillis: 5 * 60_000,
94	});
95	```
96	
97	You can also override these polling settings per request via `providerOptions.blackForestLabs`:
98	
99	```ts
100	import { blackForestLabs } from '@ai-sdk/black-forest-labs';
101	import { generateImage } from 'ai';
102	
103	const { image } = await generateImage({
104	  model: blackForestLabs.image('flux-pro-1.1'),
105	  prompt: 'A cat wearing an intricate robe',
106	  providerOptions: {
107	    blackForestLabs: {
108	      pollIntervalMillis: 250,
109	      pollTimeoutMillis: 30_000,
110	    },
111	  },
112	});
113	```
114	
115	## Documentation
116	
117	See the [Black Forest Labs provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/black-forest-labs) for more information.
118
